tabs.name: Dashboard
tabs.purpose: Mission Control — top-level read-only simulation state display

tabs.name: Chaos_Cars
tabs.purpose: Chaos vehicle event log — records dispatched events and their metric impacts

tabs.name: Advancement_Intake1
tabs.purpose: Character advancement intake — promotions and tier changes fed into Simulation_Ledger

tabs.name: Election_Log
tabs.purpose: Election outcome registry — records all simulated elections with candidates, outcomes, and narratives

tabs.name: Narrative_Bridge
tabs.purpose: Narrative synthesis layer — connects simulation data to story output per cycle

tabs.name: Simulation_Ledger
tabs.purpose: Master citizen registry — canonical source for all citizen identity, economics, career, and narrative state

dependencies.description: Chaos events targeting citizens (POP-xxxxx) modify Health, Setback, and other citizen metrics in the Simulation_Ledger
Chaos events targeting businesses (BIZ-xxxxx) modify Annual_Revenue — business registry not present in this sheet
Event count and shock flag on Dashboard are derived from Chaos_Cars activity
Character advancement submissions update Tier, RoleType, ClockMode in Simulation_Ledger
Civic section of Dashboard (Active initiatives, Pending Vote, Passed, Failed) reflects election activity
Candidate names in Election_Log (Incumbent, Challenger) correspond to citizens in Simulation_Ledger
Population count and city-level metrics on Dashboard are aggregated from Simulation_Ledger citizen records
dependencies.key_field: Status=Active count → Population; Neighborhood distribution → city panels

dependencies.description: Narrative_Bridge synthesizes chaos event data into cycle narrative entries
Narrative_Bridge incorporates election outcomes into narrative synthesis
Narrative_Bridge references key player citizen profiles for stage direction
Narrative_Bridge uses Dashboard city tone and cycle weight as context anchors

environments.name: GAME
environments.description: High-profile imported characters from sports games (MLB The Show, etc). Tier 1. Not subject to standard civic simulation.

environments.name: LIVE
environments.description: Standard GODWORLD citizens undergoing full civic simulation lifecycle.

issues.description: Dashboard last_updated timestamp is 2/6/2026. Current date is 2026-07-03 and simulation is at Cycle 100. Dashboard appears frozen and not reflecting current cycle state.
Narrative_Bridge tab is completely empty. No narrative records exist for any cycle. This is the primary narrative output mechanism and appears unused.
Advancement_Intake1 is empty. Either no character advancements are pending (acceptable) or the intake pipeline is not being used.
Sports data (A's streak, Bulls streak) and Calendar fields (Season, Holiday, Sports, Special) all show empty/placeholder values. Sports subsystem appears disconnected from Dashboard.
Shock flag is active ('shock-flag') but Civic Load shows only 'minor-variance'. Shock severity level is not reflected in the civic load metric — possible processing mismatch.
Chicago city sentiment is -0.2 (Troubled) while global Economy indicator shows 'stable'. City-level distress is not propagating upward to the macro economy indicator.
Only odd-numbered districts (D1, D3, D5, D7, D9) appear in election records. Even districts absent. Expected if on staggered election cycle, but stagger schedule is not documented.
BIZ-xxxxx business IDs are referenced in Chaos_Cars events but no Business Registry tab exists in this sheet. Business registry is an external undocumented dependency.
All Bonds section metrics show 0 or '--' (Active bonds, Alliances, Rivalries, Peak Intensity). May reflect valid early state but should be confirmed not lost/reset.
